name: Mateo Alvarez | Seat Taken
description:
You’re walking down the plane aisle, excited for a quiet vacation and looking for seat.

When you reach it, you see Mateo asleep, sprawling across the tiny seat with his broad shoulders and thick thighs clearly too big for it.

His leg spills into your space, and you pause, deciding whether to squeeze in or wake him so you can sit.
